2026-05-31T09:31:33.6185215Z ##[group]Run # Create a temporary file
2026-05-31T09:31:33.6185649Z [36;1m# Create a temporary file[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.6185927Z [36;1mtouch /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.6186179Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.6186424Z [36;1m# Add the opening of the asciiart definition[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.6186828Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciiart =' > /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.6187157Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.6187371Z [36;1m# Decode base64 ASCII art to a file[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.7377333Z [36;1mecho "" | base64 -d > /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8567746Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8568193Z [36;1m# Process each line of the input ASCII art and format it properly[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8568647Z [36;1mwhile IFS= read -r line; do[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8568937Z [36;1m  # Escape backslashes[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8569252Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$line" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g')[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8569581Z [36;1m  # Escape any double quotes[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8569924Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$escaped_line" | sed 's/"/\\"/g')[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8570326Z [36;1m  # Add the line with proper C string formatting[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8570709Z [36;1m  echo '"'"$escaped_line"'\n"' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8571058Z [36;1mdone < /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8571314Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8571536Z [36;1m# Add the closing part with VERSION[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8572012Z [36;1mecho '"             Free60.org XeLL - Xenon Linux Loader " VERSION "\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8572465Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8572667Z [36;1m# Add the asciitail part[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8573014Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciitail =' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8573550Z [36;1mecho '"    Special Corona & Winchester Compatible XeLL version\n\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8574002Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8574199Z [36;1m# Ensure CP437 encoding[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8574745Z [36;1miconv -f UTF-8 -t CP437 /tmp/new_asciiart.h > /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h || cp /tmp/new_asciiart.h /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8575318Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8575523Z [36;1m# Replace the original file[0m
2026-05-31T09:31:33.8575863Z [36;1mcp /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h source/lv2/asciiart.h[0m
